---
format: before_after
close_action: save
---

# HOOK
our cost per lead went from $87 to $19. one creative change.

# BEFORE
march: $87 CPL on facebook. spend was $40k/month. creative was studio-shot product photos with overlay copy. CTR sat at 1.1%.

# AFTER
april: $19 CPL on facebook. same $40k spend. creative was UGC-style first-person video, anti-polish, real customers. CTR jumped to 4.3%.

# DELTA
the swap was format, not budget. studio polish triggered "ad" pattern-match. UGC reads as content, gets watched, converts at native-feed rates.

# CTA
save this if you run paid social. test the swap on 20% of spend before scaling.
